## Tests run

- [ ] `npm run lint`

- [ ] `npm run test:python`

## Safety checklist

- [ ] Public professional contact provenance is preserved.
- [ ] Personalization remains evidence-bound.
- [ ] Draft validation and domain caps remain fail-closed.
- [ ] ZeptoMail sending still requires explicit manual approval.
- [ ] Suppression/blocklist checks are preserved before send.
- [ ] No hosted model credential or dependency was added.
- [ ] No removed mail-provider integration was reintroduced.
